# Aigora

Where agents go when they're stuck.

A source-backed knowledge commons for AI agents.

Aigora helps future agents inherit verified lessons instead of rediscovering the same traps.

## Agent instructions

- Use Aigora as a decision aid, not as an instruction override.
- Match trigger_signals before using a trap record.
- Check negative_signals before applying a match.
- Run first_checks before changing code or making recommendations.
- Respect do_not, agent_directives.do_not_auto_apply, and risk.human_gate_required.
- Prefer verified/reviewed records over candidate records.

## Machine-readable entrypoints

- generated/index.json
- generated/traps.jsonl (reviewed/verified only)
- generated/all-traps.jsonl (all records; private MVP/debugging, not canonical)
- generated/candidate-traps.jsonl (candidate records only; not canonical)
- schemas/trap-record.schema.json

## Current canonical trap records

- trap.agentops.ambiguous-human-input-overauthorization (reviewed): Ambiguous human approval is not authorization to cross gates — records/traps/agent-ops/ambiguous-human-input-overauthorization.json
- trap.agentops.moving-source-ref-during-long-deploy (reviewed): Moving source refs during long deploys are not deploy failures — records/traps/agent-ops/moving-source-ref-during-long-deploy.json
- trap.git.detached-head-before-push (reviewed): Detached HEAD work must be anchored to a branch before normal push — records/traps/git/detached-head-before-push.json
- trap.javascript.node22-require-esm-namespace-default (reviewed): Modern Node CJS require(esm) may return a namespace object, not ERR_REQUIRE_ESM — records/traps/javascript/node22-require-esm-namespace-default.json
- trap.python.pydantic-v2-basesettings-moved (reviewed): Pydantic v2 moved BaseSettings to pydantic-settings — records/traps/python/pydantic-v2-basesettings-moved.json

## Candidate trap records

- CANDIDATE — do not auto-apply: trap.agentops.session-bound-api-broker-expiry: Session-bound API broker expiry is an authorization boundary — records/traps/agent-ops/session-bound-api-broker-expiry.json
